chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1073 of 2019 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of CMA No.4188/2019 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 08.10.2019 Mr. Mansoor Hussain Maitlo, Advocate for petitioners. Mr. Khalil Ahmed Pirzado, Advocate for respondent No.3. Syed Sardar Ali Shah Rizvi, Deputy Prosecutor General. Mr. Shahryar Imdad Awan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned counsel for the petitioners pointed out that case was registered at P.S Setharja vide Crime No.62/2019 for offences under Section 494, 506/2, PPC against petitioner No.2 and others. After usual investigation, case was recommended for disposal in “C” class and concerned Magistrate has approved it. In the view of above development, counsel for the petitioners says that purpose of the filing of the petition has been achieved, and does not press the petition more. The same is dismissed as not pressed, however, official respondents are directed to provide the protection to the petitioners in accordance with law. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
